title: StarNailer-class fighter
content:
{{Top|leg|title=''StarNailer''-class fighter}}
The '''''StarNailer''-class fighter''' was a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] produced by [[Sublight Products Corporation|Subpro Corporation]] in the waning years of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]]. It was a rare and expensive ship that contained a class-two [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] and was introduced as a late-model. [[Zam Wesell/Legends|Zam Wesell]] used a ''StarNailer''-class fighter during her hunt for [[Hurlo Holowan]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Adventures 5: The Shape-Shifter Strikes]]''
